历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 28553 → 48612 (gap year in 2022) → 29050 → 23840 → 30700, showing significant fluctuations; due to the gap in 2022, the ranking dropped sharply, then gradually recovered in 2023–2024, and fell back to 30700 in 2025. In the past three years, it oscillated between 23800 and 30700, with a baseline of about 30700 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category (including Science) was: 87 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 87 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 81, a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of about 6.9%, intensifying competition against a backdrop of a significant increase in total examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science University Ranking has risen continuously from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, showing a significant improvement in ranking, steadily enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, which increases its appeal to candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a management recruitment announcement causing public backlash. The university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which has a certain but limited negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (comprehensive popularity 341363), rated as average, with no obvious signal of boosting or cooling; no historical enrollment gap records; Plant Protection is rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, consistent with its agricultural and forestry characteristics; other disciplines are mostly at the B level, placing the overall disciplinary strength in the mid-range among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, closely matching Guizhou University's enrollment majors in Shaanxi, including Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering, leading to high application enthusiasm for related majors; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 from 172,468 in 2025, an increase of about 19.7%, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition; Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, relatively far from Shaanxi, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment scale in Shaanxi is relatively small (over 80 in Physics Category), so regional preference factors have a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 30700, a 6.9% enrollment reduction in 2026, a 19.7% increase in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees, and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the enrollment reduction and increase in examinees jointly raise competition intensity, while the university's ranking improvement enhances attractiveness, but the slightly negative reputation has a minor offsetting effect; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 29230, moving forward about 1470 places from 2025, with a range of 28730–29730.
